---
name: Good First Issue
about: A well-defined task suitable for new contributors
title: "[GOOD FIRST ISSUE] "
labels: good first issue, help wanted
assignees: ''
---

**Summary**
A clear, one-sentence description of what needs to be done.

**Context**
Why this matters and how it fits into the project.

**Files to modify**
- `path/to/file.py` — what to change here

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`

**Helpful resources**
- Link to relevant docs or code
- Similar examples in the codebase

**Estimated effort:** [Small / Medium]
